subject: Add admportal https config info
commit_message:
Add admportal https config info

Updated sdnc-portal config to add configuration data for https
access

Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dtimoney@att.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

This conflicts with the galera change.  Once that one is merged, I'll resolve the merge conflict in this one.  I tried to rebase this change against that one, but when I tried to submit the review I saw a ton of other dependent commits so I backed off and thought I'll just wait to resolve the conflict when I can just rebase against master.

Patch Set 2:

BTW - I verified this change in my local environment and it resolves the issue with sdnc-portal not coming up.  I'm just -1ing this because of the merge conflict with the galera cluster change.

Patch Set 3: -Code-Review

Good news - merge conflict is now resolved.  Bad news - this change won't verify until galera change is merged (that's why the verify build fails).

This change was made to resolve a test issue.  I'll resolve that issue in the admportal script instead and abandon this change.  We plan to remove admportal anyway for Dublin, so might as well submit a change to do that instead.

Abandoned

No longer needed - will fix another way, to avoid conflict/dependency on galera change
